member.summary: Indicates if the group is active (default: true)

member.summary: DTO for creating a new permission

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.CreatePermissionDto.IsActive
member.summary: Indicates if the permission is active (default: true)

member.summary: Indicates if the group is active

member.summary: Data transfer object for group with permission count

member.summary: Indicates if the group is active

member.name: T:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.PermissionDetailDto
member.summary: Detailed data transfer object for permission

member.summary: Indicates if the permission is active

member.summary: Data transfer object for user permission

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.PermissionDto.GroupName
member.summary: Group name (if permission is from a group, null if direct permission)

member.name: T:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.SyncUserRolesDto
member.summary: DTO for syncing user's groups and direct permissions (sync/replace operation)

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.SyncUserRolesDto.GroupIds
member.summary: List of group IDs the user should belong to (replaces existing)

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.SyncUserRolesDto.PermissionIds
member.summary: List of permission IDs to assign directly to the user (replaces existing)

member.name: T:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.UpdateGroupDto
member.summary: DTO for updating an existing group

member.summary: Indicates if the group is active

member.summary: DTO for updating an existing permission

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.UpdatePermissionDto.IsActive
member.summary: Indicates if the permission is active

member.summary: Result of user roles sync operation (groups and direct permissions)

member.summary: Invalid group IDs that don't exist

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.UserRolesSyncResult.FinalGroupIds
member.summary: Final list of valid group IDs after sync

member.summary: Invalid permission IDs that don't exist

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.UserRolesSyncResult.FinalPermissionIds
member.summary: Final list of valid permission IDs after sync

member.name: P:PermissionAPI.Models.DTOs.UserRolesSyncResult.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the operation was completely successful (no invalid IDs)

member.name: M:PermissionAPI.Services.Implementations.UserPermissionService.GetUserPermissionsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets user permissions using stored procedure (recommended for performance)

member.name: M:PermissionAPI.Services.Implementations.UserPermissionService.GetUserPermissionsLinqAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets user permissions using LINQ (alternative to SP) Logic: UNION of direct permissions + permissions from user's groups Uses the many-to-many navigation properties generated by EF Core scaffolding
